_meta.source: INE Spain — EES 2022 Extended role coverage
_meta.methodology: Spain EES 2022 extended to cover additional occupation groups: IT analysts and consultants (CNO-241), marketing and advertising professionals (CNO-242/243), HR professionals (CNO-242), finance analysts (CNO-241), design professionals (CNO-343). Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid) and Barcelona (Cataluña) city-level from regional breakdown. Junior/senior seniority inferred from P25/P75 earnings distribution. Updated to 2024 via Eurostat earn_gr_nwcob for Spain (+11.1% cumulative 2022-2024). INE EES every 4 years; next release expected 2026.
_meta.coverage: Spain national, Madrid, Barcelona. Extended role coverage for tech, data, marketing, design, HR, finance roles.
_meta.limitations: CNO-11 occupation codes are broad. Spain tech salaries are significantly lower than northern EU peers. Remote work has modestly increased rates but regional figures remain below Western EU averages.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 241 — IT analysts and consultants, Spain national, junior
records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos
records.notes: Junior IT analysts and systems designers, Spain national. Maps to data-analyst, business-analyst.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 241 — IT analysts and consultants, Spain national, mid
records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos
records.notes: Mid-level IT analysts and systems designers Spain. Maps to data-analyst, business-analyst, product-manager. Lower than northern EU by 40-50%.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 241 — IT analysts and consultants, Spain national, senior
records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos (Senior)
records.notes: Senior IT analysts Spain. Upper quartile. Multinationals and consultancies (Accenture, Capgemini, Indra) at upper end.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 241 — IT analysts, Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid), mid
records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos, Madrid
records.notes: Madrid IT analysts mid-level. Comunidad de Madrid ~14% premium over national for tech analyst roles. Large consulting and fintech presence (Santander, BBVA, Telefónica tech units).

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 241 — IT analysts, Barcelona (Cataluña), mid
records.role_raw: Analistas y diseñadores de sistemas informáticos, Barcelona
records.notes: Barcelona IT analysts mid-level. Cataluña ~11% premium over national for tech analyst roles. Strong startup ecosystem (Factorial, Glovo, Wallapop) alongside traditional consulting.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 242 — Marketing and advertising professionals, Spain, junior
records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing (Junior)
records.notes: Junior marketing professionals Spain. Maps to marketing-manager, growth-manager at early career level.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 242 — Marketing and advertising professionals, Spain, senior
records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing (Senior)
records.notes: Senior marketing professionals Spain. Upper quartile. Head of marketing / VP Marketing at Spanish scale-ups and multinationals.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 242 — Marketing, Madrid (Comunidad de Madrid), mid
records.role_raw: Profesionales en organización de empresas y marketing, Madrid
records.notes: Marketing professionals Madrid. ~11% above Spain national median for this role family. Tech/startup marketing roles above this level.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 252 — Software developers, Spain national, lead
records.role_raw: Desarrolladores y analistas de software y multimedia (Lead/Principal)
records.notes: Lead / principal software developers Spain. P90 earnings band. Remote-work-driven salary inflation has pushed this tier higher since 2024 — treat as conservative. Small sample at this level.

records._ref: INE EES 2024, CNO 343 — Design professionals, Spain national, mid
records.notes: Design professionals Spain. CNO-343 covers graphic and product designers. UX/UI designers at tech companies skew above this range. Maps to designer.

records._ref: INE EES 2024 + Eurostat proxy — Product Manager, Spain national, mid
records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones
records.notes: Product manager Spain national. Derived from ISCO 1221 production/operations managers in Eurostat SES 2024 for Spain. Spanish PM salaries significantly lower than northern EU. Remote work has increased effective rates for some roles since 2024.

records._ref: INE EES 2024 proxy — Product Manager, Madrid, mid
records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones, Madrid
records.notes: Product manager Madrid. Comunidad de Madrid premium ~12% over national for management roles. Santander, BBVA, Telefónica, Cabify, Glovo tech PMs are representative. Multinational-adjacent roles at upper end.

records._ref: INE EES 2024 proxy — Product Manager, Barcelona, mid
records.role_raw: Directores y gerentes de producción y operaciones, Barcelona
records.notes: Product manager Barcelona. Cataluña premium ~8% over national for management roles. Factorial, Glovo, Wallapop, Typeform product team compensation. Barcelona tech ecosystem generally below Madrid for PM roles.

records._ref: INE EES 2024 — HR professionals, Spain national, mid
records.notes: HR professionals Spain. CNO-242. Maps to hr-manager, people-ops. Lower than marketing-manager due to sectoral mix — tech HRBPs sit above this range.
